name: input-group-dropdown
visual_summary: The input-group-dropdown is a versatile UI component that combines a search input field with a dropdown menu, allowing users to filter and select options from a list. It is commonly used in applications with search functionality, such as product filters or user profiles. This component is essential for building interactive and user-friendly interfaces.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-dropdown
Description: The input-group-dropdown is a versatile UI component that combines a search input field with a dropdown menu, allowing users to filter and select options from a list. It is commonly used in applications with search functionality, such as product filters or user profiles. This component is essential for building interactive and user-friendly interfaces.
Style: e.g. light, rounded, boxed
Interactions: e.g. animated, hover, clickable, on-select
Tags: ui-component, search, filter, dropdown, input-group

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
